segments.text: You've got the whole venue here, or nearly all of it, a huge crowd watching what's going down right now in front of us!
segments.original_text: Está toda la venue, o casi toda la venue, una gran parte de la venue viendo lo que está pasando ahora mismo delante nuestro, ¿eh?

segments.text: So Spargo's going for the punish right now and can't quite connect.
segments.original_text: Así que Spargo ahora mismo intentando castigar y no llega.

full_text: You've got the whole venue here, or nearly all of it, a huge crowd watching what's going down right now in front of us! Yeah, for sure. So Spargo's going for the punish right now and can't quite connect.
